documentation.file_docstring: CLI-internal send function sources, keyed by channel ID. Each value is a lazily-loaded send function for that channel.
inline_comments: Pass CLI send sources through as-is — both CliOutboundSendSource and OutboundSendDeps are now channel-ID-keyed records.

functions.name: createOutboundSendDepsFromCliSource
functions.doc: Pass CLI send sources through as-is — both CliOutboundSendSource and   OutboundSendDeps are now channel-ID-keyed records
